raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I discovered unauthorized activity on my Citi XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. An automatic payment of {$8600.00} was processed, of which only {$350.00} reflects legitimate charges. The remaining {$8300.00} was unauthorized and has already been taken from me. During the same call to report this, I was informed of an additional attempted transaction of approximately {$8700.00}, which I was told had been cancelled. However, this amount is now reflected as an outstanding balance on my account. In total, this involves approximately {$17000.00} in unauthorized and/or fraudulent activity. 

I immediately reported the fraud to Citibank on XX/XX/XXXX, and my card was frozen. I followed all instructions provided, including calling back on XX/XX/XXXX and again on XX/XX/XXXX after being told to wait 30 days. Despite this, I received a letter on XX/XX/XXXX stating that my case was closed. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I was instructed via text to call immediately and was told my case would be reopened. I called again on XX/XX/XXXX and requested a supervisor but was told to call back in one week. On XX/XX/XXXX, I was informed that appeals can not be submitted by phone and must be done in writing, which had not been communicated to me previously.

I did not authorize any of these transactions, and they originated in a state where I have no connection. I reported the issue immediately and complied with all instructions, yet my case was closed without proper resolution and with inconsistent information provided.

I am requesting a full reinvestigation, reimbursement of the {$8300.00} already taken, removal of the {$8700.00} fraudulent balance, and confirmation that this issue will not negatively impact my credit report.
